Smart Drive Elite

Privacy Policy

Effective Date: April 14, 2026

Smart Drive Elite LLC (“we,” “our,” or “us”) respects your privacy and is committed to protecting the information submitted through the platform.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect names, email addresses, phone numbers, identity information, vehicle details, financial and application data, platform usage data, and system interaction data submitted through Smart Drive Elite.

2. How We Use Information

We use data to
  • • Provide underwriting and decision support
  • • Match applicants to available inventory
  • • Improve platform performance and workflow accuracy
  • • Communicate with users and account holders
  • • Support fraud prevention, compliance, and verification

3. Data Protection

We implement reasonable administrative, technical, and operational safeguards to protect user data. However, no system, platform, or transmission method is completely secure.

4. Data Sharing

We do not sell personal data.

We may share information with authorized users, integrated service providers, lenders, technology partners, or when required by law, regulation, legal process, or compliance obligations.

5. User Responsibility

Users are responsible for ensuring they have proper authorization to submit customer, identity, and financial data into the platform and for complying with all applicable privacy and consumer data laws.

6. Data Retention

We may retain data for as long as necessary to operate the platform, support business functions, maintain compliance records, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements.

7. Changes

We may update this Privacy Policy at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

8. Contact

Smart Drive Elite LLC

doug.liber@smartdriveelite.com

© 2026 Smart Drive Elite LLC. All rights reserved.
Terms of ServicePrivacy Policy
Smart Drive Elite provides decision support tools for automotive deal structuring. Approval and funding are not guaranteed and remain subject to lender review.
